ddls:
CREATE TABLE "journeys" (
  "journey_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each journey */,
  "journey_name" TEXT /* Name of the journey */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season during which the journey is available */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date when the journey becomes available */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date when the journey ends */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the journey */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* A numeric value representing the difficulty level of the journey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chapters" (
  "chapter_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each chapter */,
  "journey_id" TEXT /* Reference to the journey this chapter belongs to */,
  "chapter_name" TEXT /* Name of the chapter */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date when the chapter becomes available */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date when the chapter ends */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the chapter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chapter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chapters_journey_id FOREIGN KEY ("journey_id") REFERENCES journeys ("journey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "chapter_id" TEXT /* Reference to the chapter this task belongs to */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "reward_id" TEXT /* Reference to the reward earned upon completion */,
  "sort_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the task should be completed */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date when the task becomes available */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date when the task ends */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* A numeric value representing the difficulty level of the task */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* The estimated time (in minutes) to complete the task */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of task IDs that must be completed before this task can be started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_chapter_id FOREIGN KEY ("chapter_id") REFERENCES chapters ("chapter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* The type of reward (e.g., experience points, items, currency) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* The value of the reward (e.g., number of experience points, quantity of items) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the player account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the player's last login */,
  "level" INTEGER /* The current level of the player */,
  "total_xp" INTEGER /* The total experience points earned by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tasks" (
  "player_task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-task record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "task_id" TEXT /* Reference to the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., not started, in progress, completed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was completed */,
  "started_date" TEXT /* The date when the player started the task */,
  "retries" INTEGER /* The number of times the player has attempted the task */,
  "difficulty_score" INTEGER /* A score representing the difficulty the player experienced in completing the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tasks_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tasks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_progress" (
  "task_progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the progress record */,
  "task_id" TEXT /* Reference to the task */,
  "total_players" INTEGER /* Total number of players assigned to the task */,
  "completed_tasks" INTEGER /* Number of players who have completed the task */,
  "started_tasks" INTEGER /* Number of players who have started the task */,
  "average_completion_time" INTEGER /* The average time (in minutes) taken by players to complete the task */,
  "average_retries" INTEGER /* The average number of retries for the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_progress_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)
